calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Continued To Aug-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brianna Mannion for Administrator in person.
Angie Lam for beneficiaries via zoom.

Discussion was held regarding concerns of the dual representation of beneficiaries and ARB, that all assigning beneficiaries are to consent to distribution of their interest to ARB's attorney, and that the 13100 Affidavit for Richard Edgar must be filed.

The matter is continued to August 26, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Determine Heirship And Entitlement To Estate
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Verified Petition To Determine Heirship And Entitlement To Estate
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Angie Lam for Heirs-at-Law, Petitioners (via Zoom).
Heirs Thomas Hodges, Amanda Gordon, and Sarah Lockwood appeared via Zoom.

The Court inquired as to the certainty that all heirs had been located. Ms. Lam reported that preliminary research had been conducted, and notice was sent to all known heirs. Ms. Lam anticipated that represented heirs would be filing assignments.

The Court expressed concern about the lack of supporting documentation to substantiate the family tree and the identification of heirs. Ms. Lam agreed to provide supplemental documentation, including marriage and death certificates, to support the petition.

The court continued the matter to July 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (55 Red Rock Way, Unit #105-O)
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brianna Mannion appearing via zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator (petitioner).
Andrew De Vries (realtor) appearing via zoom.

The sale was confirmed at $504,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 01, 2023. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. Order is under submission with the intent to grant. No additional bond is required.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Maloney: Not reported.
